Unas muertes relacionadas entre sí y que esconden múltiples incógnitas.

Un triple asesinato sin resolver, ejecutado por sicarios y envuelto en múltiples incógnitas.

programme.desc: A new animal attack raises more questions among authorities. And when Scott (Tyler Posey) and Allison (Crystal Reed) skip school unannounced, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must deal with the ever more aggressive werewolf hunters on his own.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with ways for Scott to control the transformation in order to be with Allison (Crystal Reed), while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) attempts to make an ally of Scott in his battle with the hunters.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) is savagely attacked by the Alpha, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and their friends find themselves trapped in Beacon Hills High School at night where they face both questions and suspicions about each other.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) on the run from Sheriff Stilinski (Linden Ashby), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) must help Scott (Tyler Posey) face his second full moon. Meanwhile, Jackson (Colton Haynes) tries to get closer to Allison (Crystal Reed).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Clues, including a prior encounter with Derek (Tyler Hoechlin), bring Jackson (Colton Haynes) to a dangerous revelation about Scott (Tyler Posey)…and his actions begin to threaten not only Scott's life, but his own as well.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With startling revelations weighing in on him, Scott (Tyler Posey) finds himself scrambling to protect the people he loves, including Allison (Crystal Reed) who begins to follow clues left by her Aunt Kate about her family history.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: During a secret concert, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with a method to trap the new shapeshifter. At the same time, Allison's mother (Eaddy Mays) comes up with a plan of her own to take care of Scott once and for all.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Even as his relationship with Allison (Crystal Reed) is further strained, Scott (Tyler Posey) must attend Lydia's (Holland Roden) birthday party while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) locks up his new wolves on their first full moon together.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With a secret revealed, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien), Melissa and Stilinski are taken hostage in the Sheriff's station. Allison (Crystal Reed) then tracks Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) to the station, bringing Argent and Gerard with her.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) must help win the championship lacrosse game while also trying to figure out how to stop Gerard (Michael Hogan). At the same time, Alison (Crystal Reed) and Argent (JR Bourne) continue their hunt of Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the second season finale, although everyone is still reeling from a shocking death on the lacrosse field, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends rush to figure out Gerard's (Michael Hogan) master plan…but Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has his own plan.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the exciting Season 3 premiere, a new Alpha Pack arrives to wreak havoc on Scott's (Tyler Posey) life, while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Isaac (Daniel Sharman) struggle to locate Erica (Gage Golightly) and Boyd (Sinqua Walls).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Allison and Lydia stumble on a clue to finding Boyd and Erica, while a childhood friend of Stiles goes missing. Meanwhile, Derek is surprised by the reappearance of someone from his past…someone he thought had died in the Hale house fire.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Boyd (Sinqua Walls) and Cora (Adelaide Kane) on the loose and under the influence of the full moon, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) find that they may have to turn to an unlikely ally for help…Chris Argent (JR Bourne).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to keep Isaac (Daniel Sharman) from engaging in a deadly confrontation with the Twins in school, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) attempts to prove his theory that the killings have absolutely nothing to do with werewolves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: During a bus ride to a cross country meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends flash back to the events of a preemptive strike against the Alphas that has left several injured and possibly one or more dead.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Stranded at a motel in Fairvale, California for the night because of a postponed meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and the others suffer strange experiences that cause them to believe members of their own group may the mysterious killer's newest targets.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: As the danger begins to move closer to Scott (Tyler Posey) his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton (Seth Gilliam), is threatened. Meanwhile, Kali (Felisha Terrell) and the twins (Charlie Carver and Max Carver) go after Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: As Allison (Crystal Reed) begins to suspect someone close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) conclude that Lydia's (Holland Roden) rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital during a powerful storm, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's (Adelaide Kane) life.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With the threat growing more personal and time running out, Scott (Tyler Posey) is forced to make a difficult choice to save family and friends while, at the same time, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) try to figure out how to save Cora.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, under Deaton's advice, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends use an ancient but dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion (Gideon Emery) from achieving his sinister goal.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Weeks after saving the lives of their parents, Scott, Stiles and Allison suffer strange side effects from their ritual sacrifice. At the same time, the newly enlightened Sheriff Stilinski scours through old cases, looking for supernatural causes.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote Malia before it's hunted down and killed by her father. Meanwhile, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, Mischief Night, a convicted murderer brought to Beacon Hills Hospital for surgery escapes, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends to step in to help when his unexpected target becomes clear.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Beacon Hills under curfew due to the power outage, the teens decide to throw a black light Halloween party while Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to get Kira (Arden Cho) to trust him in the midst of an attack by a strange new threat.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott's friends pledge to protect him against an increasingly hostile enemy, while Argent, Isaac and Allison search the past for answers to the shadow creatures. At the same time, Stiles, fearing he is going insane, reaches out to Melissa for help.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: After suffering from hallucinations for some time, Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously disappears one night and it's up to Scott (Tyler Posey) and the gang to figure out whether he has been kidnapped…and if the Oni had anything to do with it.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) mysteriously reappears, but is he himself? Meanwhile, Scott (Tyler Posey) must prevent a disaster and Lydia (Holland Roden) and Allison (Crystal Reed) seek help from an unlikely source...Peter Hale (Ian Bohen).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Stiles checks himself into a mental hospital named Echo House where he believes he will be safe from the Nogitsune. Will he be as far away from it as he thinks or closer than ever? Meanwhile Scott, Allison and Lydia look for a cure for him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: While Allison, Derek, Chris and Sheriff Stilinski try to track down Nogitsune, Kira's mother tells the story of the Nogitsune she came to know. Meanwhile, the Nogitsune has taken complete control of Stiles and manages to stay one step ahead.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With the Nogitsune still in control of their friend Stiles, Scott and Lydia find an unlikely ally in Peter Hale. Elsewhere, the effects of the Nogitsune have given Chris, Alison and Kira some trouble with four out-of-control werewolves.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and company race to rescue Lydia (Holland Roden) from the clutches of evil and get help from a young woman who has escaped from the metal hospital. But the Nogitsune makes a surprise move, resulting in a tragic loss to the group.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: In the Season 4 finale, struck by disaster and nearly defeated, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) call on their friends and allies to make one last stand against the Nogitsune. And someone thought dead makes a surprising return.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and his Pack journey into Mexico to rescue a missing friend.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott must turn to an unlikely ally in order to stop Kate's plan.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A new Freshman player threatens Scott's position on the Lacrosse team. Stilinski investigates a brutal murder.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Uninvited guests arrive at Lydia's lake house on the night of the full moon. Derek tracks down a killer.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: As another name is scratched off the list, Lydia is required to find the second key, thus revealing more targets. Scott, Stiles and Kira are on high alert after realizing that the assassin is on the lacrosse team.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Violet's arrest, Garrett forces Scott to help get her back by using Liam as a bargaining chip. Stiles, Lydia and Jordan seek Meredith's help to uncover the third key.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A frantic call to the CDC has everyone paranoid, especially since it was designed to target werewolves. Scott, Malia and Kira lock themselves in the Hale vault, unaware of their salvation within their grasp.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: With Noshiko's help, the team come up with a plan hoping to reveal the benefactor's identity. But Kate's arrival threatens to ruin it all. Malia comes face-to-face with Peter in the Hale vault, thus delving into her past.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: After a vain attempt to kill Parrish, it's clear that almost everyone has access to the dead-pool. Lydia dives into her grandmother's past, uncovering yet another list which leads her to Eichen House. The team soon realizes no one is safe.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and Kira fight to protect Satomi's pack from assassins. Stiles and Malia learn the origins of The Dead Pool.

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott and his Pack begin a dangerous battle against an old enemy.

programme.desc: Scott and Stiles return to La Iglesia in order to save the pack from Kate.

programme.title: Secrets of the Nazis
programme.desc: Through archives, expert insight and re-enactments, we uncover how the Nazis exploited nature.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: After the swift success at Smolensk, Hitler has diverted the bulk of Heinz Guderian's panzers down to the South, so as to capture the Ukrainian capital Kiev, considered more important than Moscow in Hitler's mind. It begins a gigantic clash and turns out to be the biggest military encirclement in history.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: Ewald von Kleist has broken through to the Terek river, slap in front of the vital oil fields of Grozny and Baku. Only freezing temperatures in the Caucasus prevent von Kleist's 1st Panzer Army from breaking through to Ozoni Kizi and Tbilisi. The Soviets launch a desperate counter-attack that holds the Germans back.

programme.title: WWII: The Price of Empire
programme.desc: Russian troops enter Berlin; Hitler commits suicide; Third Reich accepts unconditional surrender.

programme.title: The Attackers
programme.desc: Major Scheglov analyzes the intelligence report about an enemy column. The pilots discuss a dueling German, but tensions rise. Schugayev faces scrutiny for his report's accuracy. Preparing to escort the Major, the pilots discover sand in the engine. Suspicion falls on the locals. Scheglov holds the mechanic accountable.

programme.title: WWII: On the Edge of the Abyss
programme.desc: The invasion of Italy, the battle for Stalingrad, and the campaign in the Pacific turn the tide.

programme.title: Blood Money - Inside the Soviet Economy
programme.desc: In 1941, as Nazi Germany invaded, the USSR faced collapse. Stalin ordered entire factories moved east by train-steelworks, tank plants, munitions lines. Millions of workers became an army of labor, rebuilding industry and forging weapons far from the front.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: Annihilation: The Destruction of European Jews
programme.desc: In the Warsaw ghetto, Emanuel Ringelblum and the other members of the documentary group Oyneg Shabbos collected whatever they could to recount life in the ghetto. When they learn of the death at Chelmno of Jews from neighboring towns and from the Lodz ghetto at the end of 1941, they realized that the Nazis and their local auxiliaries had embarked on an operation of annihilation.

programme.title: The Attackers
programme.desc: Major Scheglov analyzes the intelligence report about an enemy column. The pilots discuss a dueling German, but tensions rise. Schugayev faces scrutiny for his report's accuracy. Preparing to escort the Major, the pilots discover sand in the engine. Suspicion falls on the locals. Scheglov holds the mechanic accountable.

programme.title: U.S. Marines in Vietnam
programme.desc: The Fall of Saigon occurred on April 30, 1975 when the South Vietnamese government announced its unconditional surrender to North Vietnam. As a line of tanks smashed through the gates of the presidential palace, Vietcong troops rounded up government soldiers, and raised their red and blue flags. The United States Embassy remained under control of the U.S. Marines.

programme.title: Secrets of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: Ambassadors in Berlin: The Whistleblowers of WWII
programme.desc: Foreign diplomats in Berlin witnessed the regime's rise-but their warnings went unheeded.

programme.title: Blood Money - Inside the Soviet Economy
programme.desc: In 1941, as Nazi Germany invaded, the USSR faced collapse. Stalin ordered entire factories moved east by train-steelworks, tank plants, munitions lines. Millions of workers became an army of labor, rebuilding industry and forging weapons far from the front.

programme.title: WWII: The Price of Empire
programme.desc: Russian troops enter Berlin; Hitler commits suicide; Third Reich accepts unconditional surrender.

programme.title: The Death Train
programme.desc: Revisiting the first massive crime of WWII killing 13,000 people in the city of Iași, Romania.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: The Amazing World of War Machines
programme.desc: The first fighter aircraft were flimsy contraptions made up of wood and fabric, flown by men with fast reflexes and deadly determination. How the times have changed. Today's fighter pilot takes control of a machine, which has doubtless cost his country millions of dollars to build.

programme.title: Auschwitz - Voices of 44 Survivors
programme.desc: End of the 1930s, in Occupied Europe. From one day to the next, young men, women and their families found themselves excluded, persecuted, hunted down and arrested, simply for being Jewish. They would soon be deported far from home, to a place that became the ultimate symbol of horror: Auschwitz, Nazi Germany's largest concentration and extermination camp.

programme.title: WWII In Color: D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: As the last Nazi offensive of the war develops, the vicious SS Panzer resort to murder.

programme.title: WWII In Color: D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Airborne troops flood the Netherlands; German forces resist, causing the operation to falter.

programme.title: WWII: Mysteries in the Archives 1938-1948
programme.desc: On June 6, 1944, the Normandy Landings, officially called Operation Overlord, began. This massive battle was also the largest media operation ever, with hundreds of reporters capturing footage under heavy fire. Among the first waves on beaches like Juno, Omaha, and Utah, these brave photographers shaped our collective visual memory of World War II.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: After the swift success at Smolensk, Hitler has diverted the bulk of Heinz Guderian's panzers down to the South, so as to capture the Ukrainian capital Kiev, considered more important than Moscow in Hitler's mind. It begins a gigantic clash and turns out to be the biggest military encirclement in history.

programme.title: Modern Warfare: Wars in the Middle East Collection
programme.sub-title: Modern Warfare: The Persian Gulf War - Part 2
programme.desc: Iraq's 1990 invasion of Kuwait; Operation Desert Storm's technological weaponry.

programme.title: Secrets of the Nazis
programme.desc: Through archives, expert insight and re-enactments, we uncover how the Nazis exploited nature.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: D-Day: 100 Days for Freedom
programme.desc: In June 1944, the Allies landed in Normandy, beginning a momentous struggle against Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Jets
programme.desc: The air war in Vietnam was unlike any other. It was the full might of the world's greatest military power pitted against an elusive, but highly motivated enemy. From an air combat perspective, the Vietnam War provided the superpowers, the US and the USSR, with the opportunity to put their best technology, and weapons systems, into the sky to fight it out.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: Ewald von Kleist has broken through to the Terek river, slap in front of the vital oil fields of Grozny and Baku. Only freezing temperatures in the Caucasus prevent von Kleist's 1st Panzer Army from breaking through to Ozoni Kizi and Tbilisi. The Soviets launch a desperate counter-attack that holds the Germans back.

programme.title: The Crusade in Europe
programme.desc: The episode explains the American capture of Strasbourg from the Germans followed by the German surprise attack on the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Battlezone: The Gulf War
programme.desc: In the early morning hours of the 17th of January 1991, coalition air forces unleashed a massive air assault on Iraqi forces in both Iraq and Kuwait. The magnitude of the coalition air offensive dealt a crushing blow to Iraq's air defense network.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: Battlezone: The Korean War
programme.desc: Covers the United States involvement with Korea and testing of Korean weapons. John Ford directed this film which is the only color documentary made during the Korean War.

programme.title: 1945-1953: From World War to Cold War
programme.desc: Hear how the Yalta Conference of 1945 - in which Franklin D Roosevelt, Winston Churchill and Joseph Stalin met to discuss Europe's post-war reorganization - led to enmity.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: Jets
programme.sub-title: Jets Over The Gulf and Afghanistan
programme.desc: The air war that was fought over Kuwait and Iraq represent the first air war of the microchip age. For the first time in military history, stealth, networked air control and precision guided munitions took to the battlefield altering the arena of air control in an unprecedented way. With veteran interviews, dramatic combat footage and commentary from former Air Force Chief of Staff Tony McPeak.

programme.title: World of Warships Clash of Titans
programme.desc: In 1941, Japan attacks Pearl Harbor, aiming to destroy the U.S. fleet and control the Pacific.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: Naval Warfare in World War II
programme.desc: Using Japanese footage, viewers see the planning, execution and, ultimately, the celebration of the country's attack on Pearl Harbor. There also is an explanation provided for the attack and some peaceful moments depicted among the U.S. sailors before the fateful events unfold.

programme.title: The Ace's War
programme.desc: At the dawn of the 20th Century, the future of aviation is in the hands of a few visionaries and daredevils. In 1903 American brothers Wilbur and Orville Wright make four flights of a few dozen meters on a North Carolina beach. The age of the pioneers ends suddenly in 1914 with the outbreak of the First World War.

programme.title: War in the Pacific
programme.desc: The fight for Bloody Nose Ridge. MacArthur attacks Japanese strongholds in the Palau Islands.

programme.title: Operation Plunder The Rhine Crossing
programme.desc: This program covers the growth of German aggression, 1934-1940. Contains many animated maps explaining German tactics and many views of Adolf Hitler making speeches and in conferences. Shows a large Nazi rally and Axis-inspired riots in Belgium and France. Also shows a Nazi rally in Madison Square Garden. Included is footage of Joachim von Ribbentrop and Fritz Kuhn.

programme.title: Operation Plunder The Rhine Crossing
programme.sub-title: ALLIES OVERRUN GERMAN DEFENSE OF THE RHINELAND
programme.desc: Part 1 shows fighting in Leipzig, Nuremberg, and Braunschweig. Includes shots of German prisoners and civilians. Shows Adolf Hitler speaking at Nuremberg in 1932. Part 2, Gen. Patton inspects troops. Shows the raising of the first official American flag to fly over Germany. Part 3 shows bodies of persons killed in German concentration camps and devices used for killing and torture.

programme.title: Combat War Channel
programme.desc: Valley Forge...Gettysburg...Wounded Knee...San Juan Hill...the Somme...Omaha Beach...Inchon...Saigon...Basra. Combat War Channel delivers the complete history of America and our allies at war as never before!

programme.title: Battlezone: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: The men of the 283rd Medical Attachment, providing air ambulance support in Vietnam.

programme.title: Living in the Shadow of WWII
programme.desc: Total war extends the battlefields - in the Second World War, for the first time, civilian casualties far outnumbered those of military personnel. And a significant proportion of those casualties were victims of the bombing campaigns waged by both sides. What was the effect of living through 'the Blitz', what precautions were taken, what forms of shelter were constructed?

programme.title: WWII In Color: US Army Air Forces
programme.desc: With relentless dedication, the U.S. Air Force helps defeat Germany.

programme.title: Battlezone: The Korean War
programme.desc: The Communist invasion of Korea which led to the entry of the US Forces into the conflict.

programme.title: Takedown with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: Former police officer Jeff is caught in a Genesee County sting operation.

programme.title: Takedown with Chris Hansen

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: La maldición del -40 golpea a los pilotos de Buffalo, Devan y Scott, en un vuelo por correo de alimentos.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Un enlace de ferry vital está caído, por lo que Buffalo organiza una campaña total para transportar 100,000 libras de productos.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.sub-title: No Te Metas Con Chuck Adam
programme.desc: El mecánico crujiente Chuck lidera la lucha para preparar a los Electra para una misión de socorro en casos de desastre en Haití.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Una misión de varias paradas al Extremo Norte tiene a Devan, Scott y Adam enfrentando una serie de obstáculos de nudillos blancos.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Los jóvenes pilotos AJ y Andrew tienen la oportunidad de su vida de volar el magnífico DC-3.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El piloto principal Arnie aterriza el DC-3 en una franja de arena casera en un refugio remoto.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cuando las tormentas eléctricas y un motor tembloroso amenazan un alquiler de DC-3 a Whitehorse.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Joe y Mikey se dirigen a Coventry, Inglaterra, para explorar la posible compra de un turbohélice Electra.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Mientras entrena a los capitanes de bombas de agua para la próxima temporada de extinción de incendios.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Crítico de las muchas paradas y arranques en el programa de Electra, y frustrado con el drama constante en Buffalo.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.sub-title: Problemas con el Tren de Aterrizaje
programme.desc: Frustrada por su falta de vuelo y atrapada en una rutina como conductora de mensajería.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cuando una avería en el ferry provoca una escasez de gasolina en Yellowknife.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Duane consigue un contrato enorme para el Electra y ejerce una enorme presión sobre el mecánico Adam.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Las chispas vuelan cuando Joe descubre que Gord ha aceptado un trabajo con una aerolínea rival.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Tratando de dejar su huella en Buffalo, Duane consigue dos contratos más de Electra.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: La decisión de Duane de dejar al equipo de Electra sin supervisión mientras pasa tiempo en casa pone en peligro.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El mecánico Jimmy es enviado a un campamento minero del norte para crear una pista de aterrizaje de hielo en un lago remoto.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El piloto novato de bombas de agua, Scott, prueba por primera vez la acción cuando Buffalo responde a una llamada de emergencia.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cuando Yellowknife y la comunidad de aviación del norte se ven sacudidos por tres accidentes en el espacio de un mes...

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Joe recibe una visita negativa de Transport Canada cuando los inspectores amenazan con cerrar la aerolínea.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Abrumado por la responsabilidad de entrenar a un nuevo rampie y luchando por salir de la caseta del perro de Joe.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Después de tomar el mando de un puente aéreo intenso y lidiar con la carga de Electra más fea que jamás haya visto.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: A solo unos meses de jubilarse, el capitán de Electra, Ray Weber, dirige a su tripulación en una misión de varios viajes.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cuando los compradores surcoreanos vienen a Buffalo para ver un bombardero de agua.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Buffalo tiene que llevar un bombardero de agua CL-215 a los compradores de Corea.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Buffalo tiene que llevar un bombardero de agua CL-215 a los compradores de Corea.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: En Corea del Sur, Cory y Justin se encuentran con el barco que entrega el avión bombardero acuático de Buffalo a nuevos compradores allí.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El aeropuerto Narsarsuaq de Groenlandia, conocido como uno de los enfoques más peligrosos del mundo.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Joe y Mikey alquilan un helicóptero para una misión de rescate para recuperar el raro cordal de un Lockheed 10-A.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Justin y Cory están varados en Croacia mientras intentan completar la entrega de dos bombarderos de agua CL-215 a Turquía.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Mikey se une con Chris Hadfield a bordo de la Estación Espacial Internacional.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El copiloto novato David enfrenta una pista de aterrizaje remota en el Ártico con tren de aterrizaje defectuoso.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Una ola de frío provoca enormes desafíos.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El Electra regresa de las reparaciones, y la tripulación lo lleva de vuelta a la pista de hielo de donde despegó antes del aterrizaje forzoso del año pasado.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Frente a la ira de Joe, Rod y Cory viajan al Reino Unido para realizar reparaciones urgentes en un avión cisterna de agua.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Mikey se entrena para sobrevivir en el Alto Ártico con los Rangers Canadienses. La Fuerza Aérea invade el hangar de Chuck.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck y Brian observan cómo una unidad de energía de 5,000 libras cae al suelo, dañando el Electra y dejándolo fuera de servicio.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El copiloto Graeme comete errores en sus aterrizajes de entrenamiento con el Electra. Chris se estresa por su chequeo de vuelo en el C-46.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Joe y Mikey viajan a Inglaterra para traer un nuevo avión a casa.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebra un hito con una mirada a los últimos cinco años, un vistazo detrás de cámaras y reflexiones de la tripulación de Buffalo.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Un incendio en el motor y una serie de fallas mecánicas hacen que Buffalo se apresure para realizar sus entregas de Navidad.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El avión Electra de Buffalo enfrenta fuertes vientos en el valle del Mackenzie.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Problemas en el motor afectan al nuevo Electra de Buffalo, ZFE, y un enfrentamiento entre Joe y Transport Canada amenaza con cerrar la aerolínea.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El piloto novato Jeff casi se sale de la pista.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Mikey decide involucrar a Buffalo en un salto de paracaidistas para conmemorar el 70º aniversario del Día D.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Los mejores pilotos de Buffalo, tanto novatos como veteranos, viajan a California para combates aéreos en aviones de combate reales.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El homenaje de Mikey al Día D, un salto en paracaídas con 20 paracaidistas, encuentra un obstáculo cuando Joe se niega a pilotar su DC-3 hasta la zona de salto.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: La Navidad está a la vuelta de la esquina, pero la comida y el correo cruciales de Buffalo se detienen. Una incautación del motor deja a Scott, AJ y el avión C-46, creando una reacción en cadena caótica. El crujiente mecánico Chuck debe intentar un cambio de motor con las manos desnudas en menos 30, y la presión de los clientes y compañeros de trabajo empuja al gerente de carga Kelly.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Una racha de mala suerte hace que el 66 grados cumpleaños del piloto en jefe Arnie huya del infierno y amenaza con estropear su sorpresa de cumpleaños traviesa. El ayudante de rampa Jeremy está desesperado por ascender en los rangos, pero una novata podría arrojar una llave en sus planes, después de que la tripulación trabaja toda la noche para convertir el DC-4 en un tanque de gas volador.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Cuando una falla de energía deja a Rankin Inlet expuesto a los elementos brutales del norte, el capitán Justin corre para entregar un generador de emergencia. El ayudante de rampa Jeremy intenta adelantarse a la compañera de trabajo Audrey entrenando a un nuevo empleado de la India para reemplazarlo. Y cuando la recesión pisa los talones de Joe, intenta negociar un acuerdo de $ 7 millones.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: El mecánico Cory corre contra el reloj para convertir dos bombas de agua de corto alcance en aviones transatlánticos para el viaje épico a Turquía. Depende del ingeniero Adam sacar a la tripulación del C-46 de un atasco en una pista de aterrizaje remota en menos 40. Y cuando el capitán Devan y el copiloto Scott encuentran la amenaza de la cizalladura del viento en el famoso Bear Rock.

programme.title: Pilotos del Ártico (Ice Pilots)
programme.desc: Un furioso Joe lucha contra una suspensión federal que le impedirá transportar pasajeros por primera vez en 20 años. También es un revés para Jeremy y las otras rampas, que empeora con una lesión inesperada. Para el equipo de waterbomber de Turquía, finalmente es una oportunidad.

programme.title: La banda degli onesti
programme.desc: Esilarante commedia diretta da Camillo Mastrocinque in cui l'inossidabile coppia Totò e Peppino si cimentano nella fabbricazione di banconote false con l'aiuto di un pittore.

programme.title: Splendori e Miserie di Madame Royale
programme.desc: Alessio, ex ballerino omosessuale, ha solo due consolazioni, la figlia adottiva e i momenti in cui si traveste con sontuosi abiti femminili e si fa chiamare Madame Royale, durante le festicciole con gli amici. Un giorno la figlia finisce nei guai e un losco commissario promette al ballerino di proscioglierla se accetterà di diventare una spia della polizia.

programme.title: Carmela è una bambola
programme.desc: Carmela è stata promessa in moglie dal padre, un guappo napoletano, ad un ricco conte, ma la ragazza ogni notte ha delle crisi di sonnambulismo e va a trovare un giovane malvisto da suo padre, Totò.

programme.title: Gli Anni Ruggenti
programme.desc: In questa splendida commedia diretta da Luigi Zampa, l'assicuratore Omero arriva in una cittadina dove tutti stanno aspettando un funzionario fascista. Scambiato per il gerarca tanto atteso, continua a svolgere il suo lavoro. Omero, nel frattempo, si innamora della figlia di un uomo che ricopre un alto ruolo istituzionale, ma l'arrivo del vero gerarca metterà tutto a rischio.

programme.title: Totò, Peppino e la… Malafemmina
programme.desc: Una delle opere più amate del grande Totò che interpreta questo divertente film comico insieme al celebre Peppino De Filippo, il bravissimo Nino Manfredi e la bella Dorian Gray. Totò e Peppino sono due buffi zii di uno studente innamorato di una ballerina. Lei, che non gode di buona fama, si trasferisce a Milano e il ragazzo la segue. Inizia il viaggio degli zii alla volta della Lombardia.

programme.title: Le Motorizzate
programme.desc: Divertente film ad episodi interpretato da Totò, Walter Chiari, Raimondo Vianello e altri famosissimi attori. Si susseguono: una suora dalla guida spericolata; una mondana che vive su una roulotte; uno sportivo che rifiuta il passaggio offertogli da una bella motorizzata; un falso vigile che intasca svariate multe e uno squattrinato che si lascia investire sperando di ricavare un grosso guadagno.

programme.title: Racconti Romani
programme.desc: David di Donatello per la miglior regia a Gianni Franciolini grazie a questo Classico interpretato dal celebre Totò, la splendida Silvana Pampanini e il grandissimo Vittorio De Sica. Uscito dal carcere di Regina Coeli, Alvaro riprende il suo ruolo di "leader" del quartiere e coinvolge tre suoi amici in una serie di azioni poco raccomandabili. I quattro furbetti si cacceranno presto nei guai.

programme.title: Bello, onesto, emigrato Australia sposerebbe compaesana illibata
programme.desc: Bellissima commedia diretta da Luigi Zampa e interpretata da Alberto Sordi, Claudia Cardinale e Riccardo Garrone. Un operaio emigrato in Australia cerca moglie per corrispondenza usando la foto di un amico. Lo raggiunge, senza rivelarsi, una ex prostituta che vuole cambiare vita. Le reciproche bugie creano una serie di divertentissimi e amari malintesi.

programme.title: Riusciranno i nostri eroi a ritrovare l'amico misteriosamente scomparso in Africa?
programme.desc: Divertentissima commedia con il grande Alberto Sordi. Un editore romano, portandosi dietro il suo fido ragioniere, parte per l'Africa alla ricerca di un suo amico misteriosamente scomparso da più di due anni. Dopo varie peripezie i due scoprono che l'amico ha lasciato dietro di sé la civiltà e si è insediato in una tribù d'indigeni dove si è spacciato per un'altra persona.

programme.title: Totòtruffa '62
programme.desc: Il principe della risata Totò in un'esilarante commedia. Antonio e Felice sono due simpatiche canaglie che, grazie alla capacità di travestirsi, tirano avanti con furti e piccoli raggiri. Il tutto per mantenere Diana, figlia di Antonio, in un lussuoso collegio. Sulle loro tracce, intanto si fa avanti il commissario Malvasia, ex compagno di scuola di Antonio.

programme.title: Il gatto
programme.desc: Amedeo e Ofelia, avidi fratelli, cercano di spingere gli inquilini del loro palazzo ad andarsene, in modo da essere liberi di vendere l'immobile, per il quale hanno ricevuto una ricca offerta. In questa divertente commedia all'italiana, Luigi Comencini dirige magistralmente due fuoriclasse come Ugo Tognazzi e Mariangela Melato.

programme.title: Il medico della mutua
programme.desc: Guido Tersilli, giovane medico appena laureato, resosi conto che la libera professione non concede, almeno agli inizi, la tranquillità economica cui aspira, decide di raggiungere il suo scopo arraffando clienti tra l'enorme pletora di mutuati. All'inizio gli affari non vanno bene, ma la morte dell'anziano dottor Bui che possiede duemilatrecento mutuati, giova alla sua carriera.

programme.title: Il Coraggio
programme.desc: Il commendator Aristide (Gino Cervi) salva Gennaro (Totò), disperato per la sua situazione economica, dal suicidio nelle acque del Tevere. Il giorno seguente Gennaro, i sei figli e il resto della famiglia si presentano a casa del commendatore chiedendo di essere mantenuti. Dopo un primo momento di sconforto l'uomo accetta, non sapendo ancora di andare incontro ad una situazione particolare.

programme.title: Il Coraggio
programme.desc: Il commendator Aristide (Gino Cervi) salva Gennaro (Totò), disperato per la sua situazione economica, dal suicidio nelle acque del Tevere. Il giorno seguente Gennaro, i sei figli e il resto della famiglia si presentano a casa del commendatore chiedendo di essere mantenuti. Dopo un primo momento di sconforto l'uomo accetta, non sapendo ancora di andare incontro ad una situazione particolare.

programme.title: L'arte di arrangiarsi
programme.desc: Il celebre Alberto Sordi in una divertentissima commedia. Rosario Scimoni, detto Sasà, è una persona opportunista e senza scrupoli, nipote del sindaco di Catania, sempre pronto a schierarsi con chiunque possa aiutarlo. Passa dal socialismo al fascismo, cambiando fede politica con la stessa facilità con cui cambia le donne. Prova addirittura a fondare un proprio partito. Diretto da Luigi Zampa.

programme.title: Amanti
programme.desc: Dopo un casuale incontro in un aeroporto, Valerio e una bella signora americana, Giulia, si ritrovano e trascorrono insieme alcuni giorni in una villa di Cortina d'Ampezzo. Valerio ignora il vero motivo che ha portato la donna nel bel paese e il loro idillio d'amore sarà presto turbato dalle scioccanti rivelazioni di un'amica di Giulia.

programme.title: Una storia moderna: l'ape regina
programme.desc: Prima opera italiana del regista Marco Ferreri con i celebri Ugo Tognazzi, Walter Giller e Marina Vlady. Il quarantenne Alfonso riesce finalmente a sposare Regina, vergine, educata, bella e molto cattolica. Quando Regina inizia a mettergli pressione perché vuole avere un bambino, l'uomo si ammala e, raggiunto l'obiettivo, Regina inizierà a trascurarlo fino a causare un drammatico evento.

programme.title: L'impiegato
programme.desc: Splendida commedia con Nino Manfredi. Estremamente ligio al lavoro, un giovane impiegato non si concede mai distrazioni di alcun genere, sfogando tutte le sue pulsioni più intime ed i suoi desideri di realizzazione con intensi sogni. Il suo mondo sembra sgretolarsi con l'arrivo di una donna a capo dell'azienda che metterà a soqquadro le sue abitudini. Diretta da Gianni Puccini.

programme.title: Questa volta parliamo di uomini
programme.desc: Grande classico del cinema italiano diretto dal Premio Oscar Lina Wertmüller e interpretato da personalità di spicco tra cui Nino Manfredi, Luciana Paluzzi e Margaret Lee. Il film, suddiviso in quattro episodi, vede come protagonisti un industriale in crisi finanziaria, un lanciatore di coltelli disperato, un contadino che disprezza la propria moglie e una donna esasperata dal marito.

programme.title: Sua eccellenza si fermò a mangiare
programme.desc: Spassosa commedia con il mitico Totò, il celebre Ugo Tognazzi, il grande Raimondo Vianello e la splendida Virna Lisi. Il ladro Totò - sotto le false spoglie di tale dottor Tanzarella - riesce a farsi invitare al banchetto di un Ministro con l'intenzione di rubare un prezioso servizio di posate d'oro. A furto avvenuto, per una serie di equivoci il sospettato sarà proprio il Ministro.

programme.title: Miseria e nobiltà
programme.desc: Una divertentissima commedia con due icone del cinema italiano, Totò e Sophia Loren. Due famiglie povere vivono sotto lo stesso tetto e i due rispettivi capifamiglia si arrangiano come possono. Un giorno però la fortuna sembra averli baciati: si presenta un marchese che gli chiede un favore molto particolare. Tratta dall'omonima opera teatrale di Eduardo Scarpetta.

programme.title: Uccellacci e Uccellini
programme.desc: Pier Paolo Pasolini disse a proposito del film: "Uccellacci e uccellini è stato il mio film che ho amato e continuo ad amare di più, prima di tutto perché come dissi quando uscì è “il più povero e il più bello” e poi perché è l’unico mio film che non ha deluso le attese."

programme.title: Telefoni Bianchi
programme.desc: Nel vivace affresco diretto da Dino Risi, una giovane impiegata sogna di diventare attrice e entrare nel brillante ma ipocrita mondo del cinema dei "telefoni bianchi". Tra ambizioni, compromessi e seduzioni, scopre quanto sia fragile il confine tra successo e illusione. Risi offre una satira acuta sull'ascesa sociale e sul fascino ingannevole dello spettacolo.

programme.title: Splendori e Miserie di Madame Royale
programme.desc: Alessio, ex ballerino omosessuale, ha solo due consolazioni, la figlia adottiva e i momenti in cui si traveste con sontuosi abiti femminili e si fa chiamare Madame Royale, durante le festicciole con gli amici. Un giorno la figlia finisce nei guai e un losco commissario promette al ballerino di proscioglierla se accetterà di diventare una spia della polizia.

programme.title: L'arte di arrangiarsi
programme.desc: Il celebre Alberto Sordi in una divertentissima commedia. Rosario Scimoni, detto Sasà, è una persona opportunista e senza scrupoli, nipote del sindaco di Catania, sempre pronto a schierarsi con chiunque possa aiutarlo. Passa dal socialismo al fascismo, cambiando fede politica con la stessa facilità con cui cambia le donne. Prova addirittura a fondare un proprio partito. Diretto da Luigi Zampa.

programme.title: Il Federale
programme.desc: Nel 1944 un graduato delle brigate nere è incaricato di catturare un professore antifascista e di condurlo dall'Abruzzo a Roma. Il viaggio di ritorno si rivela complicato, tra incidenti, bombardamenti, agguati partigiani e incursioni tedesche.

programme.title: Gli Anni Ruggenti
programme.desc: In questa splendida commedia diretta da Luigi Zampa, l'assicuratore Omero arriva in una cittadina dove tutti stanno aspettando un funzionario fascista. Scambiato per il gerarca tanto atteso, continua a svolgere il suo lavoro. Omero, nel frattempo, si innamora della figlia di un uomo che ricopre un alto ruolo istituzionale, ma l'arrivo del vero gerarca metterà tutto a rischio.

programme.title: Totò, Fabrizi e i giovani d'oggi
programme.desc: Il mitico Totò e il grande Aldo Fabrizi in una delle commedie più divertenti di sempre. Il cavalier Cocozza e il ragionier D'Amore hanno in comune solo una parlantina inarrestabile e una potente vocazione polemica. I due, acerrimi nemici, negano il consenso alle nozze dei loro figli che le proveranno tutte per riuscire a sposarsi. Ci riusciranno?

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: After a medical mission in Washington, D.C., the group heads home to Atlanta; Damon and Heavenly discuss the March on Washington with their kids; Toya confronts Anila about her finances; Quad and Heavenly come head to head over an emoji incident.

programme.desc: Life comes to a halt when everyone has to isolate; Toya discovers that Quad and Heavenly can't stop talking about her; Heavenly questions her son's investments; Simone thinks about adding to the family; Jackie surprises the ladies with a porn star.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone gives her son Miles an ultimatum; Contessa opens her new practice, but it's the same old issues with Scott; Quad throws a game-night party at her home; Toya is forced to own up to her past words about Quad's house.

programme.desc: Dr. Jackie and Dr. Simone share quality time together; Toya reveals a surprising life change; Quad finds a new man in her life; Dr. Contessa puts her body to work; Anila throws a housewarming party.

programme.desc: Contessa reveals the reasons for her fractured friendship with Heavenly; Anila and Kiran receive some news; Heavenly opens a new business; Dr. Simone and Cecil start a new adventure together; Quad and Mason navigate their new life together.

programme.desc: Simone and Cecil ask for advice about their book from an old friend; Dr. Jackie gives a patient very important advice; Anila says her final goodbye to Ms. Gomez and wonders what is next for her.

programme.desc: Heavenly grapples with changing her ways; Contessa must decide whether to let go of one of her closest friendships; Anila tries to juggle work and her children; a Halloween party stunt by Anila and Kiran goes awry.

programme.desc: Connie and Rocky's whipped-cream bikini party leaves a mess onboard Eros; Eddie's long-distance relationship is on the rocks; former sorority sisters keep the crew busy with their antics; Emile receives a discouraging letter from Rocky.

programme.desc: Captain Lee grills the crew to find out the cause of the galley fire, and his inquiry leads to a dismissal; Rocky dives off the boat in a fit of rebellion; the crew bands together to create a special birthday celebration for a charter guest.

programme.desc: Kyle pushes Sierra's patience to the limit; Ben's latest masterpiece has a nearly lethal effect; Kyle bonds with one of the charter guests while Emily and Ben take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Blitzed: The 80s Blitz Kids Story
programme.desc: Boy George was the coat check girl (admittedly stealing money from the purses) .... Bowie, synth beats, and a new freedom of sexual identity were in the air. The Blitz Club spell was cast and a hotbed of talent emerged: Ultravox, Spandau Ballet, Culture Club, Sade, and practically everyone else you've ever heard from the era.

programme.title: SPIN Presents: Trailers From Hell
programme.desc: In the 1970's Hollywood began to release a whole new type of musical film. Bob Fosse, Hippies, and Jesus were the new stars in this adventurous period in cinema.

programme.title: SPIN Presents: Trailers From Hell
programme.desc: A TFH collection of some of Hollywoods most memorable "Movies That Rock!"

programme.title: Stone Roses - Made Of Stone
programme.desc: In 2012, a resurrection no one thought possible took place when legendary band, The Stone Roses reformed after 16 years. With unprecedented access to previously unseen archive footage, MADE OF STONE is a revealing journey through the life of one of the most revered and influential bands in British music history.

programme.title: Looking for Johnny: The Legend of Johnny Thunders
programme.desc: Johnny Thunders was the legendary hard-living rock n roll guitarist who inspired glam-metal, punk and the music scene in general. Looking For Johnny is a 90-minute film that documents Thunders career from his beginnings to his tragic death in 1991. The film examines his career as a member of the New York Dolls, the punk scene with The Heartbreakers in New York City and London and much more.

programme.title: SPIN Presents: Trailers From Hell
programme.desc: A TFH collection of some of Hollywoods most memorable "Movies That Rock!"

programme.title: Johnny Thunders - Madrid Memory
programme.desc: A long lost live concert performance from The Heartbreakers explosive 1984 reunion world tour that included fellow Dolls Sylvain Sylvain & Jerry Nolan plus Billy Rath! Filmed for TV broadcast at La Edad De Oro in Madrid, Spain, this concert captures powerful performances of songs from throughout Thunders's amazing career including Personality Crisis, Too Much Junkie Business, Born Too Lose

programme.title: MOD SUN Interview: Walk With Me | SPIN Cover Story
programme.desc: No doubt MOD’s lived many lives since Happy To Be Here was first published in 2015, stating that he feels fortunate to have accomplished so much of what he’d set out to do. His main goal is to keep evolving.

programme.title: Nightclubbing: The Birth of Punk Rock in NYC
programme.desc: Nightclubbing is the first ever documentary about the renowned New York City nightclub Max's Kansas City (1965-1981) which had an indelible impact on the world of music, fashion, art, culture and the creation of the New York City Punk Rock scene

programme.title: String Theory: Guitar Obsessed
programme.desc: String Theory: Guitar Obsessed delivers a humorous but reverent look at why we love the guitar. Among the 24 distinguished people in the film: Execs from 5 major manufactures, 4 well known internet instructors and retail guitar store owners in the USA and the UK...plus distinguished professors and even the former Deputy Director of the FBI. If you play guitar, you will want to see this movie.

programme.desc: Award-winning, multi-platinum selling band The Pretenders featuring the Legendary Chrissie Hynde performs with special guests including Iggy Pop, Shirley Manson of Garbage, Kings of Leon and Incubus, recorded live at the Decades Rock Arena in Atlantic City, NJ.

programme.title: String Theory: Guitar Obsessed
programme.desc: String Theory: Guitar Obsessed delivers a humorous but reverent look at why we love the guitar. Among the 24 distinguished people in the film: Execs from 5 major manufactures, 4 well known internet instructors and retail guitar store owners in the USA and the UK...plus distinguished professors and even the former Deputy Director of the FBI. If you play guitar, you will want to see this movie.

programme.title: LoudQUIETloud: A Film About the Pixies
programme.desc: loudQUIETloud follows the rehearsals and the warm-up shows for the full-fledged, sold-out Pixies reunion tour. It also catalogs, in the cinema-verite style of the Rolling Stones' Gimme Shelter, the less glamorous side of the touring band lifestyle, getting as close to this enigmatic act as anyone is ever likely to get. The Pixies have a once-in-a-lifetime chance at rock n roll redemption.

programme.title: SPIN Presents: Trailers From Hell
programme.desc: From Amadeus the worlds first rockstar to The Beatles and Elvis, Hollywood has always remembered "When Rock Was Young"

programme.title: Until The Light Takes Us
programme.desc: Until The Light Takes Us tells the story of black metal. Part music scene and part cultural uprising, black metal rose to worldwide notoriety in the mid-nineties when a rash of suicides, murders, and church burnings accompanied the explosive artistic growth and output of a music scene that would forever redefine what heavy metal is and what it stands for.

programme.title: SPIN x Fire: Free Speech + Other Dirty Words
programme.desc: Hear Morello discuss his message and mission in Free Speech + Other Dirty Words, presented by SPIN and the FIRE, and hosted by Ryan Downey.

programme.title: Blitzed: The 80s Blitz Kids Story
programme.desc: Boy George was the coat check girl (admittedly stealing money from the purses) .... Bowie, synth beats, and a new freedom of sexual identity were in the air. The Blitz Club spell was cast and a hotbed of talent emerged: Ultravox, Spandau Ballet, Culture Club, Sade, and practically everyone else you've ever heard from the era.

programme.title: MOD SUN Interview: Walk With Me | SPIN Cover Story
programme.desc: No doubt MOD’s lived many lives since Happy To Be Here was first published in 2015, stating that he feels fortunate to have accomplished so much of what he’d set out to do. His main goal is to keep evolving.

programme.title: Gil Scott-Heron - Black Wax
programme.desc: BLACK WAX is a musical-political entertainment film produced and directed by Robert Mugge. It centers on the late African American poet-singer-songwriter Gil Scott-Heron - the man Melody Maker called the most dangerous musician alive and many dubbed the forefather of rap music - and his Midnight Band.

programme.title: SPIN COVER STORY yungblud: "walk with me"
programme.desc: If Yungblud led a cult, many would join - even those who fancy themselves hard to persuade. He has an orbit, an aura, an affability that is borderline intoxicating. You can experience it for yourself during our walk with Yungblud through the Sunset Strip, from the Viper Room to the Rainbow Bar and Grill – watch Yungblud share some incredible stories and a Dr Pepper

programme.title: Looking for Johnny: The Legend of Johnny Thunders
programme.desc: Johnny Thunders was the legendary hard-living rock n roll guitarist who inspired glam-metal, punk and the music scene in general. Looking For Johnny is a 90-minute film that documents Thunders career from his beginnings to his tragic death in 1991. The film examines his career as a member of the New York Dolls, the punk scene with The Heartbreakers in New York City and London and much more.

programme.title: LoudQUIETloud: A Film About the Pixies
programme.desc: loudQUIETloud follows the rehearsals and the warm-up shows for the full-fledged, sold-out Pixies reunion tour. It also catalogs, in the cinema-verite style of the Rolling Stones' Gimme Shelter, the less glamorous side of the touring band lifestyle, getting as close to this enigmatic act as anyone is ever likely to get. The Pixies have a once-in-a-lifetime chance at rock n roll redemption.

programme.title: Exotic Destinations 101
programme.desc: Exotic Destinations 101 is a docuseries that explores hidden pieces of paradise around the globe. Each episode will feature stunning landscapes of a particular continent, diving into what Asia, Africa, America, Oceania and Europe have to offer, perfect.

programme.title: American Food Battle
programme.desc: American Food Battle follows European chefs Henri Alén and Nicolas Thieulon on a U.S. road trip, challenging local culinary masters and exploring regional flavors.

programme.title: Toque 12
programme.desc: Yet another culinary gem in the suburbs of KL.This is real Italian with an intense Abruzzian Italian at the helm. Chef Stefano is young and like most great Italian chefs Stefano’s inspiration came from his mothers cooking.

programme.title: New Zealand From Above
programme.desc: An aerial journey over New Zealand from the deep south of the South Island to the northern tip of the North Island. We discover the landscapes and meet New Zealanders who talk about their work, interests, and culture.

programme.title: Overlanding: East Asia
programme.sub-title: MONGOLIA Like You've Never Seen It - Part 4
programme.desc: Follow Charlotte and Ken as they travel the world capturing their wanders through uncharted territories.

programme.title: Downstream
programme.sub-title: Creeks, Caves & Corvettes and How To Brew Your Own Brew
programme.desc: Kyle & Carrie float thru Bowling Green, KY land of caves and Corvettes where they visit Blue Holler Brew Supplies, Lost River Cave, Travelers Cellar Winery, White Squirrel Brewery and take a paddle on scenic Drake’s Creek.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters
programme.desc: Brian and Nick head up to Cooperstown, NY and dine at an exotic greenhouse that has a food truck as its kitchen. Join them as they visit a distillery and brewery based around the game of baseball. Then check into a world class hotel and visit a farmers museum that takes them back in time.

programme.title: Rustic Adventures: Italy
programme.desc: A hybrid food, travel and adventure show, Rustic Adventures follows two young, hot chefs who fulfilled their lifelong dream of building their own successful restaurants – from scratch – as they decide to take a much needed break and seek out inspiration for new endeavors while on a rustic food tour across Italy. Thanks to their Italian heritage, Rob Rossi (Opening: Bestellen) and Craig Harding (Opening: Campagnolo) connect with their roots while getting back to the basics of Italian cooking. With stunning cinematography and a candid documentary approach, this companion piece to the Opening series will entertain, inform and captivate you.

programme.title: Downstream
programme.sub-title: “Social Fishtancing”, White Water Kayaking & Bourbon Hand Sanitizer
programme.desc: Featuring Hartfield & Co., a Bourbon County distillery in Paris; fishing on Hinkston Creek by the Colville Covered Bridge; kayaking on the Russell Fork River, and sampling homemade apple wine.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters
programme.desc: Brian and Nick hit Brattleboro, VT and experience a true farm to table restaurant. They also stop by and chow down on some local BBQ and drink beers in two states at the same time!

programme.title: Toque 12
programme.desc: Regarded as one of the best in KL for a decade and surprisingly with hardly an Italian to be seen, except for some of the customers. A pasta Carbonara without cream, Tapas done Malaysian style, extraordinary Italian and Spanish cuisines cooked by truly Malaysian chefs. Nothing unusual here.

programme.title: New Zealand From Above

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.sub-title: Earth: Setenil de las Bodegas, Spain; Ouarzazate, Morocco
programme.desc: The Latin phrase Terra firma means “solid earth”. From ancient history, man has utilized the Terra firma beneath his feet for many reasons but most strikingly to create homes out of the solid earth.

programme.title: Outdoor Eats
programme.sub-title: Outdoor Eats in St. Pete Clearwater, Florida
programme.desc: Chef Corso enjoys a seafood catch-and-cook experience while exploring St. Pete Clearwater on Florida's gulf coast

programme.title: A Long Weekend in... With Rory O'Connell
programme.desc: Rory O’Connell’s brand new series combines travel and cookery with the popular chef enjoying the culture as well as the cuisine of eight European cities – Palma de Mallorca, Vienna, Lisbon, Madrid, Bath, Nantes, Copenhagen and Edinburgh. Rory visits a different city in each episode, and while the primary focus is on food, Rory is a knowledgeable guide to so much more, with art and design being particular interests of his. Food becomes much more interesting when seen in context – the culture it is part of the landscape it’s produced in, the history that has influenced it. At the end of each episode, Rory makes a delicious dish with the local produce which he sources on his travels.

programme.title: National Treasures
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones visits one of the grandest Restoration houses in Britain to find out why they have taken on what was once known as 'the most expensive council house in Britain'. Just off the M4 motorway in south Wales lies the jewel in the crown of Newport - Tredegar House - home to generations of the glittering Morgan dynasty and now a feather in the cap of National Trust Wales.

programme.title: Isles of the Queen
programme.sub-title: The Scilly Islands - St. Mary and Tresco
programme.desc: Turquoise seas, picturesque countryside, secluded coves: the Scilly Isles are Britain's sunny paradise. The mild climate allows beautiful exotic plants, even palm trees, to thrive on here. There are 140 islands, and their coves and beaches are popular with the Royals.

programme.desc: The Latin phrase Terra firma means “solid earth”. From ancient history, man has utilized the Terra firma beneath his feet for many reasons but most strikingly to create homes out of the solid earth.

Rory visits a different city in each episode, and while the primary focus is on food, Rory is a knowledgeable guide to so much more, with art and design being particular interests of his. Food becomes much more interesting when seen in context – the culture it is part of the landscape it’s produced in, the history that has influenced it. At the end of each episode, Rory makes a delicious dish with the local produce which he sources on his travels.

programme.title: National Treasures
programme.desc: In this programme, he visits Plas Newydd on the island of Anglesey in north west Wales, which the Trust acquired in the 1970s. Once it was the family home of the Marquis of Anglesey, and now property manager Nerys Jones has to think of new ways to attract visitors to this remote location.

programme.title: Isles of the Queen
programme.desc: In the north west of Scotland stretches the island chain of the Outer Hebrides. A barren and foresaken landscape, although there are no trees, its beauty is capitvating. Fertile marshland and rocky scapes make for a harsh but wild environment, which the Queen has come to love as a holiday spot.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.
